item.title: Why Context Matters in Security Metrics
item.description: Learn why security metrics without context fail, and how contextual risk data leads to better decisions in third-party risk management.

item.title: Why Cyber Risk Quantification Is the New ‘Best Practice’
item.description: Third party risk management practices aren’t quite hitting the mark. What can you do to properly assess risk for your organization?

item.title: Beyond Ransomware: The (Non-Ransom) Effects of Ransomware
item.description: The effects of ransomware are more than monetary. Learn more about the less-publicized effects of ransomware.

item.title: A Simple Approach to Prioritizing Cyber Risk in Your Third-Party Relationships
item.description: Managing third parties is time consuming and a bit overwhelming – what’s the best place to start when determining where your greatest risks lie?

item.title: Third-Party Cyber Risk: A Guide to Your First Steps in Managing It
item.description: A crucial step in protecting your company is understanding the risks that your third-party vendors bring to the table. Let Black Kite kickstart your process.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: Enhancing TPRM Through Insight on the Critical XZ Utils Vulnerability
item.description: We spotlight the significant cybersecurity incident at Change Healthcare, a pivotal event that has highlighted the criticality of Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) in the healthcare sector.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: Addressing the Mirth Connect and Veeam Backup Enterprise Manager Vulnerabilities: A TPRM Approach
item.description: Welcome to this week’s Focus Friday, where we delve into critical vulnerabilities that are reshaping Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) practices.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: Addressing the Veeam SPC and Cacti Vulnerabilities: A TPRM Approach
item.description: Welcome to this week’s Focus Friday, where we delve into critical vulnerabilities that are reshaping Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) practices.

item.title: Managing Risk in a Supply Chain
item.description: How a risk assessment is critical to goods and services in a supply chain with the evolving risk landscape.

item.title: Major Third-Party Data Breaches Revealed in May 2020
item.description: We regularly update the list of major third-party (aka supply-chain) attacks and breaches revealed in May 2020.

item.title: Twitter Cyber Attack
item.description: The announcement came from Twitter, claiming the attack originated from coordinated social engineering attacks targeting employees.

item.title: Why a Ticketing System is Critical to Third-Party Risk Management
item.description: Ticketing systems are useful means in guiding businesses to address alerts and issues both in an organization and in a third party.

item.title: Major Third-Party Data Breaches Revealed in July 2020
item.description: Check out our recap of July's largest third-party breaches.

item.title: The Cyber Security Posture of VPN Vendors
item.description: Here you will find the results and findings of their security posture with the outbreak of COVID-19.

item.title: What You Need to Know Today About the Cyber Posture of Remote Collaboration Tools
item.description: We reveal vulnerabilities associated with commonly-used remote collaboration platforms based on their commercially facing domains and digital footprints.

item.title: A Preview of the 2021 Manufacturing Risk Pulse: Consumer Packaged Goods
item.description: At first glance, it looks like CPG manufacturers are hitting the mark when it comes to third-party risk management.

item.title: SolarWinds Breach – Gray Rhino or Black Swan?
item.description: It’s clear whether an event should be classified as a gray rhino or a black swan. Instances such as the recent attack on SolarWinds however blurs the line.

item.title: Making the Case for Automation: Vendor Questionnaires & Compliance Mapping
item.description: How do we simplify and automate processes that truly matter? Understand the benefits of automating what matters: compliance mapping.

item.title: Top 3 Actions to Take After Reading the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report
item.description: From a CSO to CISOs: How to improve your third-party risk strategy, reduce risk exposure, and apply insights from the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report.

item.title: Qualys & Accellion: The Third-Party Breach Ripple Effect
item.description: What's at stake for Qualys and other FTA users?

item.title: Major Third-Party Data Breaches Revealed in December 2020
item.description: We count down the top 9 data breaches caused by third parties in December 2020.

item.title: 5 Lessons Learned from the Largest Third-Party Breaches in 2020
item.description: 5 Lessons Learned from the Largest Third-Party Breaches in 2020

item.title: Accellion: Another Data Breach, Defined
item.description: Read about the attack on Accellion that continues to wreak havoc on its supply-chain.

item.title: Major Third-Party Data Breaches Revealed in February 2021
item.description: Let’s take a closer look at the major third-party data breach developments from February 2021.

item.title: Black Kite Partners with Templar Shield to Expand Availability of Third-Party Risk Management and Cyber Risk Ratings Services
item.description: Black Kite is thrilled to announce its partnership with Templar Shield.

item.title: Behind the Screen: Meet 5 of the Most Notorious Ransomware Groups
item.description: Ransomware attacks grew by nearly 140% from 2019 to 2020. Let’s take a look at some of the most notorious groups.

item.title: What Is Cyber Resilience?
item.description: Learn what makes up the essential building blocks of cyber resilience — and why true resilience is about adapting to change, not fighting against it.

item.title: The Three Most Common Ways Bad Actors Target Your Digital Supply Chain
item.description: Learn about the three primary strategies that bad actors use to attack your digital supply chain – and what a breach could cost you.

item.title: What is a Third-Party Risk Assessment, and Why Do They Matter?
item.description: Learn why assessing risk to protect your business from disaster is crucial.

item.title: What is Third-Party Cyber Risk?
item.description: Learn how to protect against third-party attacks and communicate the risk they pose to prevent lost revenue, time, customer trust, and brand reputation.
